title: Wither Storm immune Gravestones
description: Makes gravestones unbreakable to the witherstorm, so you don´t lose all your items.
body:
This mod makes it, so that the gravestones from the mod: "GraveStone Mod" are immune to the Witherstorms explosions and tractor beam, so that your items don´t just get sucked up by the WitherStorm.

This mod is made for players who want to fight the Witherstorm and keep the items on death, but don´t want to have keep-inventory on.

In the mod menu this mod will be listed as: "example mod" because i used the forge developer git and don´t know how to change the name. So don´t get confused.

Can I use it in an YouTube video? Yes. just please tag me in some way.
Can I use it in a Modpack? Yes.

Creator of the mod: FlioFluigi
